name: Lemony Leek & Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
------------------------------------SOUP------------------------------------
2 tablespoons Olive Oil
4 large Leeks, white parts only, chopped
2 medium Turnips, peeled and diced
1 celery stalk, diced
2 bay leaves
1 can (14.5 oz) Diced Tomatoes, juice reserved
12 ounces Mushrooms, sliced
Juice of 1 Lemon
Salt and pepper to taste
3 tablespoons Minced Parsley
3 tablespoons Minced Dill
Optional: Matzo farfel
Combine all stock ingredients in a large pot. Bring to a boil and simmer for 30 minutes. Let stand until needed, then drain before using.
Heat olive oil in a soup pot over moderate heat. Add chopped leeks and sauté, stirring frequently, until they start to go limp.
Add the reserved stock, turnips, celery, and bay leaves. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes. Add tomatoes (including their juice) and mushrooms; simmer another 15 to 20 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste, then remove from heat. Let the soup cool slightly before serving.
Before serving, reheat gently, stir in parsley and dill, and top each bowl with matzo farfel if desired.
